cases.name: Newsom ex1.1a fitmodel1.1
cases.model:
w1comp =~ w1vst1 + w1vst2 + w1vst3
	     w2comp =~ w2vst1 + w2vst2 + w2vst3

# variances and covariances

w2comp ~~ w1comp
w1comp ~~ w1comp
w2comp ~~ w2comp
w1vst1 ~~ w1vst1
w1vst2 ~~ w1vst2
w1vst3 ~~ w1vst3
w2vst1 ~~ w2vst1
w2vst2 ~~ w2vst2
w2vst3 ~~ w2vst3
w1vst1 ~~ w2vst1
w1vst2 ~~ w2vst2
w1vst3 ~~ w2vst3

cases.name: Newsom ex1.1b fitmodel1.1b
cases.model:
w1comp =~ NA*w1vst1 + w1vst2 + w1vst3

		
	#variances and covariances
		w1comp ~~ 1*w1comp
		w1vst1 ~~ w1vst1
		w1vst2 ~~ w1vst2
		w1vst3 ~~ w1vst3

cases.name: Newsom ex1.2c fitmodel1.2c
cases.model:
w1comp =~ NA*w1vst1 + lambda1*w1vst1 + lambda2*w1vst2 + lambda3*w1vst3

w1comp ~~ w1comp

w1vst1 ~~ w1vst1
w1vst2 ~~ w1vst2
w1vst3 ~~ w1vst3
	
#Measurement intercept effects coding
		w1comp ~ 1
		w1vst1 ~ nu1*1
		w1vst2 ~ nu2*1
		w1vst3 ~ nu3*1  

#Complex constraints
	lambda1 == 3 - lambda2 - lambda3
	nu1 == 0 - nu2 - nu1

cases.name: Newsom ex14.1 fit
cases.model:
bmi1 ~~ bmi1
bmi2 ~~ bmi2
bmi3 ~~ bmi3
bmi4 ~~ bmi4
bmi5 ~~ bmi5
bmi6 ~~ bmi6

cases.name: Newsom ex14.1a fit
cases.model:
bmi1 ~~ bmi1
bmi2 ~~ bmi2
bmi3 ~~ bmi3
bmi4 ~~ bmi4
bmi5 ~~ bmi5
bmi6 ~~ bmi6

cases.name: Newsom ex14.1c fitmodel14.1c
cases.model:
#estimate mean of bmi1
#add label such as bmi1 ~ a*1 to constrain equal across groups
bmi1 ~ 1

#estimate variance of bmi1
#add label such as bmi1 ~~ b*bmi1 to constrain equal across groups
bmi1 ~~ bmi1

#estimate covariance with srh1
#add label such as bmi1 ~~ c*srh1 to constrain equal across groups
bmi1 ~~ srh1

cases.name: Newsom ex2.1 fitmodel2.1
cases.model:
w1comp =~ w1vst1 + a*w1vst2 + b*w1vst3
 w2comp =~ w2vst1 + a*w2vst2 + b*w2vst3
    
  w2comp ~~ w1comp
  w1comp ~~ w1comp
  w2comp ~~ w2comp

  w1vst1 ~~ w1vst1
  w1vst2 ~~ w1vst2
  w1vst3 ~~ w1vst3
  w2vst1 ~~ w2vst1
  w2vst2 ~~ w2vst2
  w2vst3 ~~ w2vst3

  w1vst1 ~~ w2vst1 
	w1vst2 ~~ w2vst2 
	w1vst3 ~~ w2vst3

cases.name: Newsom ex2.2a fitmodel2.2a
cases.model:
w1comp =~ w1vst1 + w1vst2 + w1vst3
	 w2comp =~ w2vst1 + w2vst2 + w2vst3

  #factor variance equality constraint with label a, remove a* for comparison;
  w1comp ~~ a*w1comp 
  w2comp ~~ a*w2comp
  w2comp ~~ w1comp
  
  w1vst1 ~~ w1vst1
  w1vst2 ~~ w1vst2
  w1vst3 ~~ w1vst3
  w2vst1 ~~ w2vst1
  w2vst2 ~~ w2vst2
  w2vst3 ~~ w2vst3 
      	     	
  w1vst1 ~~ w2vst1 
  w1vst2 ~~ w2vst2 
  w1vst3 ~~ w2vst3

cases.name: Newsom ex2.2b fitmodel2.2b
cases.model:
w1comp =~ NA*w1vst1 + w1vst2 + 1*w1vst3
	     	 w2comp =~ NA*w2vst1 + w2vst2 + 1*w2vst3

	#variances and covarainces
	#factor variance equality constraint, remove a* for comparison;
		w2comp ~~ a*w2comp 
		w1comp ~~ a*w1comp
		w2comp ~~ w1comp
			
		w1vst1 ~~ w2vst1 
	  w1vst2 ~~ w2vst2 
	  w1vst3 ~~ w2vst3

cases.name: Newsom ex2.2c fitmodel2.2c
cases.model:
w1comp =~ w1vst1 + a*w1vst2 + b*w1vst3
	 w2comp =~ w2vst1 + a*w2vst2 + b*w2vst3

#factor variance equality constraint, remove v* for comparison:
		w2comp ~~ v*w2comp 
		w1comp ~~ v*w1comp
    w2comp ~~ w1comp 
  
		w1vst1 ~~ w2vst1
		w1vst2 ~~ w2vst2
		w1vst3 ~~ w2vst3

cases.name: Newsom ex2.5b fitmodel2.5b
cases.model:
w1comp =~ w1vst1 + a*w1vst2 + b*w1vst3
		w2comp =~ w2vst1 + a*w2vst2 + b*w2vst3

    w2comp ~~ w1comp
    w1comp ~~ w1comp
    w2comp ~~ w2comp
    w1vst1 ~~ w1vst1
    w1vst2 ~~ w1vst2
    w1vst3 ~~ w1vst3
    w2vst1 ~~ w2vst1
    w2vst2 ~~ w2vst2
    w2vst3 ~~ w2vst3
    w1vst1 ~~ w2vst1
    w1vst2 ~~ w2vst2
    w1vst3 ~~ w2vst3
    
    #intercepts
    #constrained with lables c and d;
    w1comp ~ 1
    w2comp ~ 1
    w1vst1 ~ 0*1
    w1vst2 ~ c*1
    w1vst3 ~ d*1
    w2vst1 ~ 0*1
    w2vst2 ~ c*1
    w2vst3 ~ d*1

cases.name: Newsom ex3.1 fit
cases.model:
w1posaff~~w1posaff
  w2posaff~~w2posaff
  w1posaff~~w2posaff

cases.name: Newsom ex3.1b fitmodel3.1c
cases.model:
w1posaff ~ a*1 #remove "a*" for unconstrained model
    w2posaff ~ a*1
    w1posaff~~w2posaff

cases.name: Newsom ex3.1c fitmodel3.1c
cases.model:
i =~ 1*w1posaff + 1*w2posaff
	  d1 =~ 0*w1posaff + 1*w2posaff

    #set measurement intercepts to 0
    w1posaff ~ 0*1
    w2posaff ~ 0*1

    #means
    i ~ 1 
    d1 ~ 0*1    #remove 0* for unconstrained model
     #without 0*, test of d1 mean provides Wald test of difference;
    
    #variances
    i ~~ i
    d1 ~~ d1
    d1 ~~ i
    
    #set residual variances to 0
    w1posaff ~~ 0*w1posaff
    w2posaff ~~ 0*w2posaff

cases.name: Newsom ex3.4a fitmodel3.4a
cases.model:
w1posaff ~~ w2posaff
    w2posaff ~~ w3posaff
    w1posaff ~~ w3posaff
		w1posaff ~ a*1 
		w2posaff ~ a*1
		w3posaff ~ a*1

cases.name: Newsom ex4.1 fitmodel4.1
cases.model:
w2unw ~ w1unw
  w1unw~1
  w2unw~1

cases.name: Newsom ex4.4 fitmodel4.4
cases.model:
w1unw =~ w1unw1 + a*w1unw2 + b*w1unw3
		w2unw =~ w2unw1 + a*w2unw2 + b*w2unw3
		
		w2unw ~ w1unw #covariance

	#correlated errors -- removed for comparison;
		w1unw1 ~~ w2unw1
		w1unw2 ~~ w2unw2
		w1unw3 ~~ w2unw3

cases.name: Newsom ex5.5b fitmodel5.5b
cases.model:
eta1 =~ 1*srh1
		eta2 =~ 1*srh2
		eta3 =~ 1*srh3
		eta4 =~ 1*srh4
		eta5 =~ 1*srh5
		eta6 =~ 1*srh6

	#first and last residuals must be set to 0 for identification;
		
		srh1 ~~ 0*srh1
		srh6 ~~ 0*srh6
		srh2 ~~ srh2
		srh3 ~~ srh3
		srh4 ~~ srh4
		srh5 ~~ srh5

		eta2 ~ eta1
		eta3 ~ eta2
		eta4 ~ eta3
		eta5 ~ eta4
		eta6 ~ eta5

cases.name: Newsom ex7.6b fitmodel7.6b
cases.model:
i =~ 1*cesdna1 + 1*cesdna2 + 1*cesdna3 + 1*cesdna4 + 1*cesdna5 + 1*cesdna6
		s =~ 0*cesdna1 + 1*cesdna2 + 2*cesdna3 + 3*cesdna4 + 4*cesdna5 + 5*cesdna6

    i ~~ i
    s ~~ s
    i ~~ s
    
    i ~ 1
    s ~ 1
    
    cesdna1 ~ 0*1
    cesdna2 ~ 0*1
    cesdna3 ~ 0*1
    cesdna4 ~ 0*1
    cesdna5 ~ 0*1
    cesdna6 ~ 0*1

cases.name: Newsom ex1.1 fitmodel1.1
cases.model:
w1comp =~ w1vst1 + w1vst2 + w1vst3
	     w2comp =~ w2vst1 + w2vst2 + w2vst3

# variances and covariances

w2comp ~~ w1comp
w1comp ~~ w1comp
w2comp ~~ w2comp
w1vst1 ~~ w1vst1
w1vst2 ~~ w1vst2
w1vst3 ~~ w1vst3

w2vst3 ~~ w2vst3

w1vst2 ~~ w2vst2
w1vst3 ~~ w2vst3
